name: Grit Sampler
explanation: A gritty 12-bit drum sampler built around a short public-domain (CC0 / US Navy) drum-cadence segment baked right into the plugin. Each played note pitch-tracks the sample, then deliberately degrades it with variable bit-depth quantization and sample-rate decimation for a crunchy vintage character, finished with a soft-clip drive, a tone low-pass and an amp envelope. Controls: Pitch, Grit, Crush, Tone, Drive, Decay and Level.
